current_activity: Discovery plan for the frontend lane that fixes the React todo UI MVP boundary, captures frontend-facing contract needs, prioritizes unknowns, and prepares a minimal later-phase task graph without crossing into design or implementation.

Discovery outline for the React todo frontend objective: keep scope to core todo CRUD and completion flows, isolate frontend responsibilities from backend and integration concerns, capture contract dependencies and unknowns, and prepare an acceptance-ready review bundle for design entry.

Discovery for the backend lane is split into parallel analysis of MVP ownership boundaries, dependency seams, and contract unknowns, followed by a synthesis task that confirms the minimal backend team shape and packages acceptance-ready outputs without selecting implementation details.
Discovery outline for the todo backend objective, focused on MVP boundary definition, persistence decision framing, and acceptance-ready handoffs into design.

Discovery plan for the backend lane produces the backend integration boundary, deferred design-question register, CRUD acceptance evidence outline, and a pragmatic staffing recommendation, then packages the required boundary-input handoff for middleware without selecting the backend stack or persistence implementation.

Discovery-only frontend lane plan that materializes the user-flow boundary note, contract open-question list, acceptance evidence outline, and a blocking middleware handoff while confirming whether the existing frontend manager/worker pair is sufficient for the MVP.

Discovery plan for the middleware lane stages required frontend and backend boundary-input intake, then synthesizes shared ownership, dependency, unknown, and validation artifacts at discovery fidelity, and finally packages a single acceptance-ready review bundle without committing to design or implementation choices.

Discovery plan for the integration objective uses the existing frontend, backend, and middleware lanes to define MVP boundaries, capture cross-lane unknowns, map dependencies, and prepare a minimal discovery review bundle for phase exit without committing to detailed design or implementation.

Authored the backend discovery boundary note at the assigned path. The note defines backend ownership for todo create/list/update/complete-uncomplete/delete flows, server-side validation and persistence obligations, frontend-visible contract expectations, cross-team boundaries, and explicit design-phase deferrals for framework, storage, authentication, and detailed API schema. It also records that several required planning inputs were missing from the resolved runtime context.
Validated final artifacts on disk after interruption.
status_reason: Validated final artifacts on disk after interruption.

current_activity: Discovery confirms the intended backend MVP boundary stays limited to simple todo CRUD, persistence durability, and backend-side validation, while authentication, collaboration, real-time sync, reminders, due dates, labels, search/filtering, and other advanced behaviors remain non-goals. The task is blocked because every required planning input was unresolved in the injected Resolved Inputs, and the owned discovery artifact cannot be created in this read-only run.
